query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of black fabric with visible folds and creases creating a rippled texture across the surface. The material features undulating planes and shallow ridges, showing the soft, draped quality of the textile and the directional play of shadow across its surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of black fabric with visible folds and creases, severely underexposed so that most detail is swallowed by oppressive, crushed shadows. Weak tonal separation and overwhelmingly dark values create a suffocating, heavy atmosphere across the frame, with only faint ridges of the draped textile barely emerging from near-total blackness.
